---
title: "Patient Integration"
params: 
  patient: "P2"
  patientbis: "P3"
  fileP2: "~/Documents/Singlecell-R/Scripts/Matrix/CLL_Seurat_P2"
  fileP3: "~/Documents/Singlecell-R/Scripts/Matrix/CLL_Seurat_P3"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Sample Integration

Integrate the 2 and 3 patients

```{r}
#| message: false
library(SeuratObject)
library(Seurat)
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
data_p2<-readRDS(params$fileP2)
data_p3<-readRDS(params$fileP3)
```
